name: codex-kit
description: Codex Kit plugin for scaffolding repositories, discovering shipped skills, and setting up local Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Scaffold repos, discover skills, and set up Codex.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex-native setup flows for project scaffolding, workspace plugin installation, local skill management, and shipped skill discovery.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Kit to set up this repository for Codex and install the workspace plugin.
Use Codex Kit to list, search, install, or sync the shipped Codex Kit skills.
